steps.title: Match the pronoun
steps.content: The previous sentence identifies "Danny Boy" as a single song. The blank is the subject of the next sentence and must refer back to that singular noun.

steps.title: Keep number agreement
steps.content: A and B are plural pronouns, so they do not agree with a single song. C refers to individual members of a group and does not fit the sentence. The needed pronoun is singular and can serve as the subject of ranked. The answer is D.
